name: ELECTROLUX, AB Namn-Aktier B o.
summary: ELECTROLUX, AB Namn-Aktier B o.: Electrolux B manufactures and sells household appliances under brands like Electrolux, AEG, and Frigidaire. Their products include refrigerators, ovens, washing machines, dishwashers, and vacuum cleaners. The company is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
